name: frosmoth
flavor_texts: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit.
It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.
text: Frosmoth is the Frost Moth Pokémon. It is a ice and bug-type Pokémon. Abilities: shield-dust, ice-scales (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 65, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 125, Sp. Def: 90, Speed: 65. Evolution line: snom → frosmoth. Lore: Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit. It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away.
